name: Gary Voorhis
summary: Former U.S. Navy technician who has described radar and data-handling activity connected to the 2004 Nimitz events.
profileSummary: Former U.S. Navy technician who has described radar and data-handling activity connected to the 2004 Nimitz events.
background: Former U.S. Navy fire-control technician aboard USS Princeton.
inclusionNote: Included because his account links the Nimitz case to shipboard radar systems, data handling, and the broader witness network.
